title: senecio × londinensis
intro: Senecio × londinensis, also known as London pride or Jacob's ladder, is a hybrid plant that is a cross between the greater ragwort (Senecio jacobaea) and the common ragwort (Senecio vulgaris). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Senecio × londinensis include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Senecio × londinensis can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat a variety of health conditions, although its use should be approached with caution due to the presence of toxic compounds.
